<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Stackpath](https://www.stackpath.com/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/stackpath/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "stackpath"
  dnsCredentials:
    # STACKPATH_CLIENT_ID: Client ID
    clientID: ""
    # STACKPATH_CLIENT_SECRET: Client secret
    clientSecret: ""
    # STACKPATH_STACK_ID: Stack ID
    stackID: ""
    # STACKPATH_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # STACKPATH_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # STACKPATH_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
